HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8
Server: Apache/2.4.1 (Unix)
Content-Length: 100

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head><title>Raw HTTP Test</title></head>
<body><h1>Multiple Raw HTTP Response - First</h1></body>
</html>
HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found
Content-Type: text/plain
Server: Nginx
Content-Length: 20
